---
title: "Divyas Mystic Sanctuary | Tarot, Reiki & Crystal Ball Guidance"
description: "A calm space for intuitive guidance, energy healing and spiritual reflection."
---

<section class="hero" aria-labelledby="hero-title">
<div class="hero__stars" aria-hidden="true"></div>
<div class="hero__orb hero__orb--one" aria-hidden="true"></div>
<div class="hero__orb hero__orb--two" aria-hidden="true"></div>
<div class="hero__content reveal">
<img class="hero__logo" src="images/logo-mark.png" alt="Divyas Mystic Sanctuary logo">
<p class="eyebrow">A space for clarity &amp; calm</p>
<h1 id="hero-title">Divyas Mystic<br><em>Sanctuary</em></h1>
<p class="hero__services">Tarot Reading <span>✦</span> Reiki Healing <span>✦</span> Crystal Ball Guidance</p>
<p class="hero__intro">Come home to your intuition. Find a little more light for the path ahead.</p>
<div class="hero__actions"><a class="button button--gold" href="contact.html#book">Book a session <span>↗</span></a><a class="text-link" href="#services">Explore offerings <span>↓</span></a></div>
</div>
<a class="scroll-cue" href="#welcome" aria-label="Scroll to welcome section"><span></span></a>
</section>

<section id="welcome" class="section section--intro reveal-on-scroll">
<div class="section__overline">Welcome</div>
<div class="split-heading"><h2>Gentle guidance for<br><em>life's turning points.</em></h2><div><p>Whether you are looking for perspective, a restorative pause, or space to listen inwardly, each session is personal, confidential and led with care.</p><a class="text-link" href="about.html">Meet your guide <span>→</span></a></div></div>
</section>

<section class="section healer-feature reveal-on-scroll" aria-labelledby="meet-divya">
<div class="healer-feature__portrait"><img src="images/Divya%20VS.png" alt="Divya, founder of Divyas Mystic Sanctuary"><span>Divyas Mystic Sanctuary</span></div>
<div class="healer-feature__copy"><p class="section__overline">Meet your healer</p><h2 id="meet-divya">A gentle presence for<br><em>your healing journey.</em></h2><p>Divya offers a calm, compassionate space for reflection, intuitive guidance and restorative Reiki healing. Every session is personal, respectful and shaped around what you need most.</p><a class="button button--outline" href="about.html">More about Divya <span>→</span></a></div>
</section>

<section id="services" class="section services-section">
<div class="section-heading reveal-on-scroll"><div><p class="section__overline">Offerings</p><h2>Choose the practice that<br><em>meets you where you are.</em></h2></div><a class="text-link" href="services.html">View all details <span>→</span></a></div>
<div class="service-grid">
<article class="service-card reveal-on-scroll"><div class="service-card__symbol">✧</div><p class="service-card__number">01</p><h3>Tarot Card<br>Reading</h3><p>Reflect on questions around love, work, purpose and the choices in front of you.</p><a href="services.html#tarot" aria-label="Learn about Tarot Card Reading">Discover <span>→</span></a></article>
<article class="service-card reveal-on-scroll"><div class="service-card__symbol">☼</div><p class="service-card__number">02</p><h3>Reiki<br>Healing</h3><p>A quiet, restorative energy practice to support balance, rest and emotional wellbeing.</p><a href="services.html#reiki" aria-label="Learn about Reiki Healing">Discover <span>→</span></a></article>
<article class="service-card reveal-on-scroll"><div class="service-card__symbol">◉</div><p class="service-card__number">03</p><h3>Crystal Ball<br>Guidance</h3><p>Explore possibilities and reconnect with your own inner knowing through intuitive insight.</p><a href="services.html#crystal" aria-label="Learn about Crystal Ball Guidance">Discover <span>→</span></a></article>
</div>
</section>

<section class="quote-section reveal-on-scroll"><p class="quote-section__mark">“</p><blockquote>Clarity does not always arrive as an answer. Sometimes it begins as a feeling that you are ready to listen.</blockquote><a class="button button--outline" href="contact.html#book">Begin your journey <span>↗</span></a></section>
